card_description: Eric is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Context: "Dick reveals a "steganographic" reading of his own work, specifically the "Felix" message hidden within *Flow My Tears*."

linked_segments.summary: Dick reveals a "steganographic" reading of his own work, specifically the "Felix" message hidden within *Flow My Tears*. He argues that the Parousia required a "topological superimposition" (Rome Two)
linked_segments.title: 1976-09-15_Dorothy_08.txt
